textByHashes.10294b2a89da62b80d0941aff6e7d7c36adb7b36: Our Lord Saradomin needs your help!
textByHashes.2f4e665f84f09beb27b69f426c3f31c3ac6b1205: You're needed at Castle Wars, our forces are weakening and we need you as reinforcements.
textByHashes.3d787bbaffe63089303820e2338b964d18bc4d44: Praise Saradomin, I'll send you there right away!
textByHashes.e9199f4dee21f75fb33f01ab63e70c53ba0f6e33: I urge you to reconsider, before it's too late.
textByHashes.109a5e3fd0037d5fb0e160ea0aa5b377959c868d: Fight for the greater good today!
textByHashes.37b269842e047bdd210e8d08412b8e1dca00d7fb: The light of Saradomin is fading, he needs your help!
textByHashes.425caa8c64af11b9ca1159b8c079b3d7cb8912d4: Zamorak is a false god who is a stain on this world, Saradomin will guide you forward.
